title: LifecycleRun
description: the running of a Step (a defined transformation) — a prov:Activity that instantiates a prov:Plan (the Step). Consumes inputs + produces outputs per the Step's contract. MAY belong to a larger workflow-run trace via `run_id`; MAY carry content-addressed references to its inputs + outputs artifacts; MAY record which Project / release-unit it operated in via `for_project` (v2.2.0+).

valid_from.description: business-truth window start — when this fact became true in the world; null = since-forever

valid_to.description: business-truth window end — when this fact stopped being true; null = still valid

confidence.description: reliability score for this instance; 1.0 = certain, 0 = no confidence

for_project.description: the Project / release-unit this run operated in — optional; meta-runs and pre-Project runs omit it
